heading: Limitation on use of Federal funds
label: 2809 Limitation on use of Federal funds

children.heading: Definition
children.label: a Definition
children.text: In this section, the term “implementation date” means the date that is 5 years after the date on which standards for each National Geospatial Data Asset data theme are established under .section 2806 of this title

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: b Limitation
children.text: Except as provided otherwise in this section, on and after the implementation date, a covered agency may not use Federal funds for the collection, production, acquisition, maintenance, or dissemination of geospatial data that does not comply with the applicable standards established under , as determined by the Committee.section 2806 of this title

children.heading: Exception for existing geospatial data
children.label: c Exception for existing geospatial data
children.text: On and after the implementation date, a covered agency may use Federal funds to maintain and disseminate geospatial data that does not comply with the applicable standards established under if the geospatial data was collected, produced, or acquired by the covered agency before the implementation date.section 2806 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Chairperson of the Committee may grant a waiver of the limitation under subsection (b), upon a request from a covered agency submitted in accordance with paragraph (2).

children.label: A
children.text: be submitted not later than 30 days before the implementation date;

children.label: B
children.text: provide a detailed explanation of the reasons for seeking a waiver;

children.label: C
children.text: provide a detailed plan to achieve compliance with the applicable standards established under ; andsection 2806 of this title

children.label: D
children.text: provide the date by which the covered agency shall achieve compliance with the applicable standards established under .section 2806 of this title

children.heading: Best efforts to comply during transition
children.label: e Best efforts to comply during transition
children.text: During the period beginning on the date on which standards for a National Geospatial Data Asset data theme are established under and ending on the implementation date, each covered agency, to the maximum extent practicable, shall collect, produce, acquire, maintain, and disseminate geospatial data within the National Geospatial Data Asset data theme in accordance with the standards.section 2806 of this title
